creator: public2016@hauptsignal.at
text:
Created attachment 172750
Fix manpage

I'm not sure but I think there is a spelling error in the man-page of sort(1).

"Stable sort.  This option maintains the original record order of records that have and equal key. This is a non-standard feature, but it is widely accepted and used."

In my opinion it should be "... records that have an equal key. ..."
